sourceLines: @yah:ticket(R008-T4, "Idempotent uploader + atomic manifest swap (prior-manifest diff, commit at /manifest.json)")

@yah:next("Walk dist/{server,html,assets,hydrate}; content-hash each blob; fetch prior /manifest.json + assets list from R2; upload only changed objects under /{build_id}/; swap /manifest.json as the last step (commit point). Test: publish-twice with no source change = 0 new uploads.")

next_steps: Walk dist/{server,html,assets,hydrate}; content-hash each blob; fetch prior /manifest.json + assets list from R2; upload only changed objects under /{build_id}/; swap /manifest.json as the last step (commit point). Test: publish-twice with no source change = 0 new uploads.
ticket.title: Idempotent uploader + atomic manifest swap (prior-manifest diff, commit at /manifest.json)

sourceLines: @yah:ticket(R008-T5, "Tag-diff CDN purge (new vs prior tag-index → purge changed tags)")

@yah:next("Fetch prior /tag-index.json; diff against new emissions; union of (changed-tag set ∪ tags that vanished); call CdnPurger.purge_tags once. Test: changing one route's content purges only that route's tag, not the whole site.")

next_steps: Fetch prior /tag-index.json; diff against new emissions; union of (changed-tag set ∪ tags that vanished); call CdnPurger.purge_tags once. Test: changing one route's content purges only that route's tag, not the whole site.
ticket.title: Tag-diff CDN purge (new vs prior tag-index → purge changed tags)
